title: See How They Run
writer: Leslie Arliss, Philip King, Roy Miller
actors: Ronald Shiner, Greta Gynt, James Hayter
plot: Cockney corporal Wally Winton (Ronald Shiner) desires promotion so that he can finally receive an inheritance. He dresses up as a priest and goes out one night with Penelope Toop (Greta Gynt), the vicar's attractive blonde wife. T...
